title: Lululemon slashes UK Align pants pricing by 22% in mid-season flash sale
snippet: Lululemon Athletica has launched an aggressive 48-hour promotional campaign across the UK, pricing flagship leggings at £58 (down from £78) with prominent Google search ads.

classification.summary: Lululemon Athletica is conducting a 48-hour flash sale in the UK, significantly reducing the price of its flagship Align pants by 22%. This aggressive pricing strategy targets cost-sensitive consumers and could disrupt market dynamics for competing activewear brands.
